title: Fast Car
why_this_song: Fast Car by Tracy Chapman (1988) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 12 times; first heard in: "You got a fast car"
Appears 9 times; first heard in: "I-I had a feeling I could be someone, be someone, be someone"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "So I remember we were driving, driving in your car"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "Speed so fast, I felt like I was drunk"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "And I-I, had a feeling that I belonged"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: I want a ticket to anywhere
Maybe together we can get somewhere
City lights lay out before us
And your arm felt nice wrapped 'round my shoulder
And I-I, had a feeling that I belonged
I-I had a feeling I could be someone, be someone, be someone

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "fast" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "fast" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "someone" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "someone" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: See, my old man's got a problem
You'll find work and I'll get promoted

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I want a ticket to anywhere
We'll move out of the shelter

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Fast Car" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Fast Car" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
